facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. The Beauty Bar in Ông Lang sits away from the resort crowds, and that's exactly the point. 4.8 stars across 480 reviews. Ông Lang keeps delivering. Order a drink, watch the light drop, do nothing for a while. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Drinks arriving. Sun dropping. Zero crowds. The Beauty Bar at Ông Lang is the reset button Phu Quoc tourists keep missing. 4.8 stars, 480 reviews deep.

instagram.caption: This place fixes burnout. The Beauty Bar, Ông Lang. 4.8★, 480 reviews. Away from the crowds. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Sun going down. Drink in hand. The Beauty Bar hits different when the crowds disappear.
